Impl.=Ganho
Viewing with Implantação counted as Ganho — 0 Implantação deals reclassified as Won. All charts, KPIs and modals reflect this. Toggle off in filter bar to revert.
AE ConversioniWin rate per Account Executive on closed deals in the filtered period. Open deals are excluded. Toggle Deals/Vidas. Click a bar to drill into that AE's closed deals.

Financial Results & Revenue Estimates

  

    

    

      
Won Deals — Axenya Revenue (Monthly)

      
Pipeline Revenue Estimate by Stage

      
Weighted Axenya Revenue by Stage

      
Estimated Receivables Timeline

    

    

      

        Formula: ≥200 vidas: 100% PM (1st mo) + 5% PM × 11 mo. <200 vidas: 100% PM × 3 mo + 2% PM × 9 mo. Fee por vida: receita estimada.
        Weighted = Est. Revenue × stage win probability.
        Coverage:  have Prêmio Mensal filled.
